allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); tasks=d[''''tasks'''']; statuses={}; [statuses.__setitem__\(t[''''status''''], statuses.get\(t[''''status''''],0\)+1\) for t in tasks]; print\(f''''Total tasks: {len\(tasks\)}''''\); [print\(f''''  {k}: {v}''''\) for k,v in sorted\(statuses.items\(\)\)]")

hooks.command: echo "=== Branch: $(git branch --show-current) ==="; echo ""; node -e "const t=require('./.ralph/tasks.json').tasks.filter(x=>x.status!=='done');if(!t.length){console.log('BACKLOG EXHAUSTED — run backlog replenishment before starting work.');}else{console.log('Active tasks:');t.forEach(x=>console.log(' ['+x.status+'] '+x.id+': '+x.title));}" 2>/dev/null || echo "(could not read tasks.json)"
